description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude male figure standing upright on a rectangular base, with his arms bent and hands clasped together near his chest. The figure is highly detailed, showing defined musculature and realistic anatomical proportions, reminiscent of classical Greco-Roman statuary. The head is slightly bowed, and the facial features are finely rendered, conveying a contemplative or introspective mood. The back of the sculpture reveals strong, well-modeled muscles and a naturalistic stance, with one leg slightly forward. The surface appears to be smooth stone, likely marble, with subtle textural variations that enhance the realism. The base is simple and unadorned, serving to elevate and stabilize the figure.
description: A detailed, life-sized nude male figure in a contemplative pose, sculpted in smooth stone on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and clasped hands, with a clear view of the muscular torso and legs.
description_view_1: Three-quarter front view highlighting the figure's profile, arm definition, and the naturalistic stance with one leg forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, buttocks, and the back of the legs, emphasizing anatomical detail.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view showing the curvature of the back, the side of the face, and the transition from the torso to the legs.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and neutral.
